trades.reasoning: LITE has dropped off the momentum screener entirely, signaling a loss of bullish momentum — selling the full position to free capital for higher-conviction setups.
Score 95 with RSI in the optimal 55–70 momentum zone, rising MACD histogram signaling accelerating momentum, and price comfortably above SMA-20 — textbook momentum entry.
Score 95 with RSI 68.5 at the top of the bullish zone, confirmed volume surge above 1.5x average, and price above SMA-20 — strong trend with participation from volume.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ printing near-zero moves — a consolidation session. LITE has vanished from the momentum screener entirely, which is a warning sign of deteriorating trend strength, so selling it frees roughly $870 to rotate into AAOI and ESI, both scoring 95 with clean momentum reads. The rest of the portfolio — EAT, ETSY, AMZN, GOOGL, QQQ — remains intact as all are holding above stop-loss levels.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted in an extremely tight range on April 29, with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ closing virtually unchanged as investors paused ahead of key upcoming economic data and continued digesting a busy earnings calendar. This kind of low-volatility, directionless tape is typical mid-earnings season when market participants are reluctant to make large bets before high-impact reports land. Beneath the flat surface, individual momentum names continued to show relative strength, reflecting quiet sector rotation rather than a broad index move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於4月29日幾乎原地踏步，標普500與納斯達克雙雙收平，市場在等待重要經濟數據與消化密集財報季的同時陷入觀望。這種低波動、缺乏方向的盤面在財報季中段十分常見，投資者不願在關鍵報告公佈前輕易建立大倉位。然而指數表面平靜之下，個股動能股持續展現相對強勢，顯示本週市場動力來自板塊輪動，而非指數的整體上漲。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Capital rotation means selling positions that are losing momentum and redeploying that cash into stocks with stronger signals. When a stock falls off the momentum screener — like LITE did today — it is often an early sign that institutional buying has dried up. By rotating out of LITE and into AAOI and ESI, the portfolio stays aligned with where market energy is actually flowing rather than sitting in a weakening position.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 資本輪動是指投資者賣出動能衰退的持倉，將資金重新配置到技術面更強的標的。當一隻股票如LITE般從動能篩選名單消失，往往是機構資金退場的早期訊號。今日將LITE換入AAOI與ESI，正是讓投資組合持續跟隨市場資金流向，避免被動能弱化的股票拖累整體表現。
